parameters.query:
SELECT
  u.user_id, u.name, u.registered, u.total_goals,
  t.trivia_id, t.trivia_number, t.question,
  t.option_a, t.option_b, t.option_c,
  t.sent_at, t.closes_at,
  t.has_multiplier,
  EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (t.closes_at - NOW())) AS seconds_remaining,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ct_trivia_responses r
   WHERE r.trivia_id = t.trivia_id AND r.user_id = u.user_id) AS ya_respondio
FROM ct_users u, ct_trivias t
WHERE u.phone = '{{ $json.phone }}'
  AND t.status = 'sent'
  AND t.sent_at <= NOW()
  AND t.closes_at > NOW()
ORDER BY t.trivia_number ASC
LIMIT 1
